cards.title: Decomposition Contract
cards.governance_note: Document partition rule, subproblem validity, base cases, and progress measure.

cards.title: Combination Correctness
cards.governance_note: Verify that recombination preserves correctness, handles boundaries, and includes all required information.

cards.title: Partition Traceability
cards.governance_note: Preserve partition IDs, partial outputs, recurrence assumptions, run manifests, and final aggregation evidence.
